case_title: MAGDALENO LOPEZ VS. TIERNANS OF SAN FRANCISCO, LLC A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, MAGDALENO AS TO DEFENDANT TIERNANS OF SAN FRANCISCO, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY D.B.A. TIERNANS IRISH PUB, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, MAGDALENO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIERNANS OF SAN FRANCISCO, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY D.B.A. TIERNANS IRISH PUB, $14,027.50 PRINCIPAL, $63.94 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,461.44, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
